subject: [COMMON][ETCD] Uses new tpls for repos / images
commit_message:
[COMMON][ETCD] Uses new tpls for repos / images

This commit makes etcd template to use the new generator for repositories and
images.

Issue-ID: OOM-2364
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: Ia28c072aeef6bc58af3ec0acd584753df1f9b07c
